title: Food Process 3D Step Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Food Process 3D Step Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable 3D food process infographic with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable 3D food process infographic built around xiaolongbao. process steps: knead dough, mix filling, roll wrappers, wrap, steam, serve. presenter character: friendly 3D chef. composition: 3:4 composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: Premium 3D rendered or sculptural visual language with crisp materials, depth, clean lighting, and polished commercial finish. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: xiaolongbao as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: warm beige food science poster defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
